detail.description: Christian Koss grounds into a force out, third baseman Nick Gonzales to catcher Henry Davis. Jesus Rodriguez out at home. Luis Arraez to 3rd. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd. Christian Koss to 1st.
Christian Koss grounds out, pitcher Anthony Bender to first baseman Kyle Stowers.
Christian Koss grounds into a force out, third baseman Graham Pauley to second baseman Xavier Edwards. Drew Gilbert out at 2nd. Christian Koss to 1st.
Christian Koss flies out to right fielder Owen Caissie.
Christian Koss flies out to right fielder Esteury Ruiz.
Christian Koss grounds out, second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Christian Koss pops out to second baseman Bryson Stott.
Christian Koss lines out sharply to shortstop Trea Turner.
Christian Koss flies out to right fielder Corbin Carroll.
Christian Koss grounds out, third baseman Nolan Arenado to first baseman Pavin Smith.
Christian Koss grounds into a force out, third baseman Nolan Arenado to second baseman Ketel Marte. Drew Cavanaugh out at 2nd. Christian Koss to 1st.
Christian Koss singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr.
Christian Koss flies out to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Christian Koss flies out to right fielder Colton Cowser.
Christian Koss pops out to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson.
Christian Koss doubles (1) on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward.
Christian Koss flies out to center fielder Cole Carrigg.
